Henotheism is believing in one god but not denying the existence of others. It is like [[monotheism]] but without the pressure of exclusivity. 
[[Category:Theology]]
[[sn:Henotheism]][[sn:Henotheism]][[Category:Religion]]
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Henotheism]][[sn:Henotheism]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
